stemHtml: Post-flight reports from crew must be submitted to AIS when they concern…

options.a: The condition or operation of air navigation facilities, or the presence of wildlife hazards.
options.b: The presence of birds, or inaccuracies in the Airline Operational Manual.
options.c: The condition of air navigation services, or items for the Safety Investigation Authority.
options.d: Inaccuracies in the Airline Operational Manual, or condition of air navigation facilities.
